title: Moon-Titan (ServerPack)
body:
## This modpack is made to play on the Moon-Titan Minecraft server network.


Moon-Titan runs daily events at 5:00 PM and 8:00 PM (CET). All servers are already pre-configured in the modpack, so you can join up to 15 minutes early and never miss the start.

The entire network is built around our custom Fabric 1.21.1 mod TitanReborn, which powers the different gamemodes and systems used on the server.

On Moon-Titan you can play event-based gamemodes, such as:

Survival Games / UHC-style events with teams, PvP, and shrinking borders.

![Two players fighting during a Moon-Titan event.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/03a7e8560dc36b97bef81add848d6b37d7059cc6.png)

The modpack also includes client-side improvements, UI features, and small utilities that make playing on the network smoother and easier.

🌐 https://moontitan.de

💬 https://discord.moontitan.de

It contains: 

- Titan Reborn
- Inertia Anti Cheat
- BetterGrassify
- Bright Plus
- Enhanced Block Entities
- Entity Culling 
- Ferrite Core
- Hat Layer
- EMI
- Lithium
- ModernFix
- Moonlight Lib
- Polymer
- Polytone
- Sodium
- VeryManyPlayers
- WI Zoom
- BetterF3
- Default Options
- Craft Tweaker
- Mod Menu
- Balm
- Fabric API 
- Faithful Texturepacks
